svg.text: Dr. Laura Mitchell — Smart daily dashboard
Critical alerts render as a dedicated red-bordered
card above the fold, separate from routine KPIs.
Laura triages abnormal results before she opens
AI-suggested text in the snapshot panel is
chart data, and requires explicit review before it
Patient rows show social risk factors alongside
clinical ones. Non-medical barriers to care —
transportation, food insecurity — are visible at a
glance, not buried in the chart.
DESIGN DECISION — QUICK ACTIONS OVER NAVIGATION
The right rail always surfaces the next concrete
action — start the visit, sign a note, read a
message — instead of requiring Laura to navigate
